text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Gimlet, you were so dashing as a bartender. The
way you tossed and twirled those bottles and
glasses! My heart fluttered just watching. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And the mocktail you made for me was so good...
Hehe, thank you for the wonderful night. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
What praise! And coming from Lady Shamrock
herself—I am honored and delighted!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, just curious, did you set up that makeshift
bar in the school cafeteria just for me?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I did mention the other day how I was curious to
know what a bar was like, but would never
actually get to visit one.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Heh... A whimsical muse whispered into my ears,
that is all.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Say, Kris, would you happen to know
anything? You were helping Gimlet, weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
I was an assistant. I did only trivial things. Getting
permission to use the cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Kris S
text_block_list.text:
Asking your security about your tastes... Looking
for a four-leaf clover to put on the mocktail...
That is all.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. You're free to interpret things how you
like.
